query_normalized: latentskill: from in-context textual skills to in-weight latent skills for llm agents linguistics
rationale: The paper investigates an alternative way to represent LLM agent skills—converting free‑form textual skill descriptions into typed pseudocode—and measures its impact on agent performance, thus covering a key independent variable (skill representation format) within the same domain of LLM agents as the user's latent‑skill question (acceptance criterion (b)).
